falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top phase, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 2022 May Luna bottom's 38.2% Fibonacci retracement level by 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking this key retracement level would invalidate the pattern similarity to the 2022 bottom, suggesting a new bullish trend rather than a continuation of the prior pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average with a volume surge (>50% above 30-day average)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This confirmed bullish crossover with increased volume would contradict the HOLD signal by indicating a clear trend reversal and invalidating the UNKNOWN phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
